channel.title: .NET on Saleh Muhammed
channel.description: Recent content in .NET on Saleh Muhammed

item.title: C# & .NET Notes
item.description: Speaking C# # Discover C# Compiler Version # With the C# 7.x generation, Microsoft decided to increase the cadence of language releases, releasing minor version numbers, also known as point releases, for the first time since C# 1.1. To discover your compiler version, you can go to your terminal and run the command: dotnet --version To determine which versions of the C# compiler you have available, enter the following command:
